query:
SELECT f.id, f.code, f.name, f.fieldType, f.isRequired, f.displayOrder, s.name as section_name, s.code as section_code
FROM formFields f
JOIN formSections s ON f.sectionId = s.id
WHERE f.name LIKE '%0%' OR f.code LIKE '%0%'
ORDER BY s.displayOrder, f.displayOrder;

JOIN formSections s ON f.sectionId = s.id
WHERE f.name LIKE '%0%' OR f.code LIKE '%0%'
ORDER BY s.displayOrder, f.displayOrder;
